calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DAVID KELLER's MOTION TO TRANSFER is GRANTED pursuant to stipulation. The case is transferred to San Mateo County and plaintiff Melissa Watson shall pay all required transfer fees.

STIPULATION AND ORDER signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.
